segment.source: A footer promoting a mobile app: heading, rich-text description, App Store and Google Play buttons, an optional QR code image, and a copyright line. Use it for: download-our-app sections, store badge rows, and QR-code install prompts at the end of a page. Prefer 'App Hero' to pitch the app at the top of a page; use 'Site Footer' when no app promotion is involved.
